models.label: Linear Runtime V2
models.description: Default online-ready runtime with stronger explainability and surface-fit behavior.
notes: Suitable for interview demos with explainable prediction
Supports balanced, ctr, cvr, and ecpm objectives

models.label: Linear Conservative V1
models.description: Candidate runtime with lower click volatility and stronger conversion stability.

models.label: Artifact Bundle V1
models.description: Artifact-backed predictor that simulates trained bundle loading for formal inference.
notes: Uses artifact-bundle predictor instead of inline linear weights
Suitable for demonstrating migration toward trained-model inference
